calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-12-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-12-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up.
Department 514, Judge: A. James Robertson, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Keri Evilsizor, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant THEA ANGELA CABRERA and DIMNA CABRERA.
Witness Juliet Byers appearing for Plaintiff sworn and examined.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-30 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendants as follows:
Principal $7949.52
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $7949.52

Judgment signed in open court.
